name: Blueberry Bundt Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg yellow cake mix, 18 oz size
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cake mix, eggs, applesauce and yogurt in a large bowl; mix well.
2. In a small bowl, toss blueberries in flour to coat; add 2 cups batter and mix well.
3. Pour half of the batter into greased and floured 10-inch tube pan; top with remaining blueberries.
4. Combine sugar, cinnamon and nuts in a small bowl; mix well.
5. Sprinkle mixture over blueberries.
6. Top with remaining batter.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for about 1 hour.
8. Cool in pan for 15 minutes; invert onto a rack and cool completely.
9. Cut into slices and serve topped with whipped topping, if desired.
